body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35344", "cvss": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-252", "name": "Unchecked Return Value"}], "description": "The dd utility in uutils coreutils suppresses errors during file truncation operations by unconditionally calling Result::ok() on truncation attempts. While intended to mimic GNU behavior for special files like /dev/null, the uutils implementation also hides failures on regular files and directories caused by full disks or read-only file systems. This can lead to silent data corruption in backup or migration scripts, as the utility may report a successful operation even when the destination file contains old or garbage data.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00115, "percentile": 0.01848}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wh8p-h9hw-x2mc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-29T23:00:44Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wh8p-h9hw-x2mc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wh8p-h9hw-x2mc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35344"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:36Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35344", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/issues/9745", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wh8p-h9hw-x2mc"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "uutils coreutils has an Unchecked Return Value Issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-29T23:00:45Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wh8p-h9hw-x2mc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
